hooks.command:
echo '## Post-Compaction Context Reload

Phase 1 best: mol = 1.3357 BPC (100k steps, WikiText-103-raw)
Phase 2 target: hdc_gate BPC < 1.3357

Study design: STUDY_DESIGN.md (Q1: mol vs baseline_wide, Q2: mol vs mol_single)
Training config: TRAINING_METHODOLOGY.md (bfloat16, C-AdamW, scaled init)

Before any model change: python utils/verify.py check
Check training status: python utils/reporter.py
Verification workflow: .claude/rules/run-full-verification.md'
